Title: SSL Certificate - Subject Common Name Does Not Match Server FQDN
Solution: The SSL certificate common name does not match the server FQDN. This may indicate a misconfiguration.
Exploitability: Update the SSL certificate to match the server FQDN, or configure the server to use the correct certificate.

Title: Microsoft SQL Server January 2024 Security Update
Solution: Install the January 2024 security update for SQL Server.
Results: SQL Server 2019 CU22 missing security patch

Title: TLS/SSL Server Supports TLS Version 1.0
Solution: TLS 1.0 is deprecated and should be disabled. Modern clients support TLS 1.2 and 1.3.
Exploitability: Disable TLS 1.0 and enable only TLS 1.2 and TLS 1.3. Update cipher suites to remove weak ciphers.
